chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4447 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19761/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.05.2025 Barrister Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Counsel for the petitioner submits under instructions that he confines the ambit of this petition to seeking that the application dated 13.07.2024 made to the learned Secretary Home Department, available at page 143 of the court file, may be decided. He seeks that the application be decided expeditiously, preferably within 30 days, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned AAG has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
